fireplace_remodel.description: Transform an outdated fireplace into the visual anchor of your home with custom stone, tile, mantels, and modern surrounds.

new_fireplace.description: Add a brand-new gas, electric, or wood-burning fireplace with expert venting, framing, and premium finish work.

fire_pits.description: Custom gas fire pits, fire bowls, and fire tables that create the perfect outdoor gathering space.

outdoor_kitchens.description: Built-in grills, countertops, sinks, refrigeration, and complete outdoor cooking and entertaining spaces.

outdoor_fireplaces.description: Statement outdoor fireplaces in stone, stucco, or modern finishes that anchor your backyard living area.

patio_heaters.description: Freestanding, wall-mounted, ceiling, and built-in heating solutions for year-round outdoor comfort.
